prestazioni: Engine: Lambda II 3.3L V6 Twin-Turbo (G6DH) with upgraded Garrett GTX4271R turbochargers (58mm inducer, 71mm exducer) paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system from Armytrix Valvetronic, featuring 304-grade mandrel-bent piping and dual 102mm titanium tips for optimized backpressure reduction and spool characteristics.

Fuel System: Injector Dynamics ID1050x fuel injectors (1050cc/min) with a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup (PN: 20-0119) to manage blow-by gases, alongside a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump (PN: F90000267) and a custom AEM 340024-100 fuel pressure regulator for consistent rail pressure under high-load conditions (targeting 60psi base, 72psi under boost).

ECU & Tuning: OpenECU Stage 2+ standalone ECU (PN: M150-G6DH) with a custom 20x20 ignition and fuel map calibrated by Unichip Korea, utilizing a 3-bar MAP sensor and wideband O2 sensors (Bosch LSU 4.9) for real-time AFR monitoring. Includes a custom flex-fuel sensor (Continental 5WK96621) for E85 compatibility, with boost targets set to 24psi peak (tapering to 22psi) and ignition timing advanced to 18° BTDC at 5,500 RPM (stock: 12° BTDC).
estetica: Aero: Liberty Walk LB Works G70 widebody kit (PN: LB-G70-01) with carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a duckbill rear spoiler (3-piece construction, adjustable angle up to 15°). Includes a custom front splitter from Seibon Carbon (PN: HY-G70-FSPLIT) with integrated canards (3D-printed titanium, 45° angle) and a rear diffuser from Varis (PN: VAR-G70-RDIF) with dual 3.5" exhaust cutouts.

Suspension: KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (PN: 3W93100A) with 3-way adjustable damping (rebound, compression, preload) and 80mm of ride height adjustability. Paired with Cusco front and rear sway bars (PN: 404 540 A for front, 404 541 A for rear) in 22mm diameter (stock: 18mm) and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (PN: SPF0115K for front control arms, SPF0116K for rear subframe).

Wheels & Brakes: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2x2 (PN: CR2x2-19x9.5 +22 front, 19x11 +30 rear) in matte bronze with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear). Braking system upgraded to Alcon 6-piston monoblock calipers (PN: 6-STUD-G70-F) with 405mm two-piece floating rotors (PN: 405x36-G70) and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads (PN: FDB2075) for track use, paired with stainless steel braided lines from Goodridge (PN: SS4706).
